SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE /*+ INDEX(DCS,XIF1DCS) */ DCS DCS SET DCS.ITEM_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.itemDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DCS.TRANSACTION = DCS.TRANSACTION + 1, DCS.ORDINARY = COALESCE(DCS.ORDINARY, 0) + COALESCE(${param.ordinary}, '0'), DCS.CHEQUE = COALESCE(DCS.CHEQUE, 0) + COALESCE(${param.cheque}, '0'), DCS.AO_CAEO = COALESCE(DCS.AO_CAEO, 0) + COALESCE(${param.aoCaeo}, '0'), DCS.JGMT1000 = COALESCE(DCS.JGMT1000, 0) + COALESCE(${param.jgmt1000}, '0'), DCS.MISCELLANEOUS = COALESCE(DCS.MISCELLANEOUS, 0) + COALESCE(${param.miscellaneous}, '0'), DCS.ORDINARY_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.ORDINARY_CURRENCY, NULL, DECODE(${param.ordinaryCurrency}, NULL, NULL, ${param.ordinaryCurrency}), DCS.ORDINARY_CURRENCY), DCS.CHEQUE_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.CHEQUE_CURRENCY, NULL, DECODE(${param.chequeCurrency}, NULL, NULL, ${param.chequeCurrency}), DCS.CHEQUE_CURRENCY), DCS.AO_CAEO_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.AO_CAEO_CURRENCY, NULL, DECODE(${param.aoCaeoCurrency}, NULL, NULL, ${param.aoCaeoCurrency}), DCS.AO_CAEO_CURRENCY), DCS.JGMT1000_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.JGMT1000_CURRENCY, NULL, DECODE(${param.jgmt1000Currency}, NULL, NULL, ${param.jgmt1000Currency}), DCS.JGMT1000_CURRENCY), DCS.MISCELLANEOUS_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.MISCELLANEOUS_CURRENCY, NULL, DECODE(${param.miscellaneousCurrency}, NULL, NULL, ${param.miscellaneousCurrency}), DCS.MISCELLANEOUS_CURRENCY) WHERE DCS.REPORT_ID = ${param.reportId} AND DCS.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode}

UPDATE /*+ INDEX(DCS,XIF1DCS) */ DCS DCS SET DCS.ORDINARY = DECODE(DCS.ORDINARY, 0, NULL, DCS.ORDINARY), DCS.CHEQUE = DECODE(DCS.CHEQUE, 0, NULL, DCS.CHEQUE), DCS.AO_CAEO = DECODE(DCS.AO_CAEO, 0, NULL, DCS.AO_CAEO), DCS.JGMT1000 = DECODE(DCS.JGMT1000, 0, NULL, DCS.JGMT1000), DCS.MISCELLANEOUS = DECODE(DCS.MISCELLANEOUS, 0, NULL, DCS.MISCELLANEOUS), DCS.ORDINARY_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.ORDINARY, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, DCS.ORDINARY_CURRENCY), DCS.CHEQUE_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.CHEQUE, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, DCS.CHEQUE_CURRENCY), DCS.AO_CAEO_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.AO_CAEO, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, DCS.AO_CAEO_CURRENCY), DCS.JGMT1000_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.JGMT1000, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, DCS.JGMT1000_CURRENCY), DCS.MISCELLANEOUS_CURRENCY = DECODE(DCS.MISCELLANEOUS, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, DCS.MISCELLANEOUS_CURRENCY) WHERE DCS.REPORT_ID = ${param.reportId} AND DCS.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode}

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
